dimensions.reason: testing changed; no critical risk flag

recommended_revalidation_scope: Targeted independent revalidation of affected components before deployment
recommended_governance_path: Independent model-risk review and change-governance adjudication required before any deployment
adjudicator_prompts: Confirm the change is within the model's approved use; a net-new use case is an intake, not a change.
Verify independent validation coverage for each changed component before deployment.
Confirm data-lineage and provenance review for any changed data source.
Record the human adjudication decision and rationale in the change record.
narrative: Change MCR-2026-0087 to high-materiality, regulated model MDL-00902 changes two high-weight-touching dimensions: data (same vendor feed moved to a weekly refresh) and testing (refreshed backtest vintages). No critical flags fired. Under the model owner's versioned banding config for this model (band_high_min_dims 4, high_materiality_min_dims 3), the deterministic impact band is High because the change touches a high-materiality model on a high-weight dimension. Recommended revalidation scope: Targeted independent revalidation of affected components before deployment. A human adjudicator must review the cited evidence and decide; this analysis does not itself clear the change. Impact assessment and revalidation recommendation only; not a change approval or deployment authorization. No model change has been approved, deployed, or attested.
